underlying_goal: Start an Expo dev server and test the app on a physical iPhone using a QR code
friction_detail: Claude first suggested iOS simulator on Windows (impossible), then started dev server in offline mode preventing QR code generation, and an API error also interrupted the flow.
brief_summary: User wanted to test their Expo app on a physical iPhone via QR code but Claude failed to properly start the dev server with networking enabled, and the session ended without achieving the goal.
